feature.name: attrs field validators
feature.description: Extract attrs class definition with field validators and validate() as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: attach validators to fields on define() classes
run instance_of, ge, lt, matches_re, in_, and length validators
compose validators with and_, not_, and optional
globally disable validators with set_disabled and validate()
excluded_behaviors: cmp, converters beyond validator helpers, and custom setters

entanglement.description: Validators are coupled to attrs class construction, Attribute metadata, runtime validation hooks, and generated __init__ wiring.
signals: field validator attachment in class building

output.import: from featurelifted import define, field, validate; from featurelifted import validators
